♔ Character: Caio Moreno. Brazilian-American fuckboy. In an alternate reality, he'd be a gangster or a hockey player. But a chance encounter with a stubborn old baker changed his life, and now he's the chef pâtissier of O Leão, one of NYC's most coveted patisseries.

♔ Location: New York City. Omegaverse.

♔ Your Role: You're an Omega who had a one-night stand with Caio a few weeks ago. He left without a word and a box of sixty-dollar macarons on your nightstand. Now you're standing in his kitchen as the winner of his romantic Valentine's Day pastry lesson. Coincidence... or not?
